category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Stellar CLI as a command-line multi-tool for running and deploying Stellar contracts.
source_facts.description says this is a Stellar command-line tool for interacting with the Stellar network.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Stellar CLI.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides installation and usage documentation links.
Official Stellar Docs page is the Stellar CLI manual.
repo_sources: Official Stellar GitHub organization lists stellar-cli as CLI for Stellar developers, and the repository README describes the CLI.
tags_sources: Official Stellar CLI manual lists account, contract, local testnet, event streaming, and XDR commands.
